title: Find the Smallest Divisor Given a Threshold
titleCn: 使结果不超过阈值的最小除数

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,5,9], threshold = 6 Output: 5 Explanation: We can get a sum to 17 (1+2+5+9) if the divisor is 1. If the divisor is 4 we can get a sum of 7 (1+1+2+3) and if the divisor is 5 the sum will be 5 (1+1+1+2).
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: We can get a sum to 17 (1+2+5+9) if the divisor is 1. If the divisor is 4 we can get a sum of 7 (1+1+2+3) and if the divisor is 5 the sum will be 5 (1+1+1+2).
